title: verbascum × murbeckii
intro: Verbascum × murbeckii, also known as mullein, is a biennial or perennial plant species that belongs to the figwort family. The plant's leaves, flowers, and roots have been traditionally used in herbal medicine for their medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Verbascum × murbeckii include soothing respiratory issues, such as coughs and bronchitis, reducing anxiety and stress, and promoting wound healing. Verbascum × murbeckii can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture to harness its medicinal properties, and it's also used in skincare products and creams for its moisturizing and soothing effects.
